item.title: Bullying Turned Deadly—Caught on Camera
item.description: Brooke Makenna discusses a tragic case involving bullying, with footage captured on camera.

item.title: 30 Years Later, a Killer Finally Confesses

item.title: Kurt Sova’s Case Remains Unsolved After 40 Years
item.description: Brooke Makenna explores the long-unsolved case of Kurt Sova and the questions that remain after four decades.

item.title: Young Girl TAKEN From Her Bedroom
item.description: An overview of the Danielle van Dam case, covering the investigation, key evidence, and how authorities ultimately brought resolution to the case.
